title: agrostis tenuis var. hispida
intro: Agrostis tenuis var. hispida, also known as hairy bent or hairy red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis tenuis var. hispida involve its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Agrostis tenuis var. hispida can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and other minor ailments.
